title: rubus cryptadenus
intro: Rubus cryptadenus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cryptadenus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions and wounds. Rubus cryptadenus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the leaves, roots, and fruits of the plant.
